commits: c1db945: test(0.5.4-MIGRATE-sidechannels): RED — metrics via record_event/recorder seam

additional_changes_made_in_scope: Adapted tests/test_recorder_cutover.py sink_names assertions for the new always-on 'metrics' sink: test_no_double_emit_enterprise_once_fathom_once -> ['enterprise','metrics','fathom']; test_fathom_sink_absent_when_flag_unset -> ['enterprise','metrics'] plus an explicit 'fathom' not-in check. Intent preserved (no double-emit; fathom flag-gated), assertions not weakened.

Adapted tests/test_metrics.py: re-pointed TestAirlockMetricsCallback + TestMutationsCounter through record_event (SimpleNamespace events with asdict'd mutation dicts); removed TestSelfRegister (the _self_register symbol was deleted). Assertions preserved.

Review-nit follow-up (commit fd0463c): hardened _record_mutations_from_event to skip non-dict items (isinstance guard) — restores exact crash-safety parity with the old getattr-based helper, since _serialize's str() fallback could place a non-dict in event.mutations. Added test_mutations_non_dict_item_skipped; added an intentional-duplication comment on the two empty-mutations tests in test_metrics.py.
